chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
article_title: Renderers and Transporters of Inedible Kitchen Grease
text: It is unlawful for any person to steal, misappropriate, contaminate, or damage inedible kitchen grease, or containers thereof.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 5. Renderers and Transporters of Inedible Kitchen Grease [2460 - 2482]
##### § 2474

It is unlawful for any person to steal, misappropriate, contaminate, or damage inedible kitchen grease, or containers thereof.

*(Added by Stats. 1998, Ch. 394, Sec. 3. Effective January 1, 1999.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful for any person to steal, misappropriate, contaminate, or damage inedible kitchen grease, or containers thereof.
